content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1495: The day the star area ends!

Translator:

Sigma_

Editor:

Hitesh_

The two ash-gray skeletons inside the coffins slowly had a fulgent light emitting from them; vitality could be detected inside their skulls.

The little skeleton had tears in his eyes, holding his parents’ hands while crying inaudibly.

Hiro’s eyes were red as well. “Even though we didn’t get anything from Desolate Territory, it’s enough that they’re finally awakened.”

“Congratulations! The White Bone Clan will have two more Territory Ancestor Realm experts! The White Bone Clan will thrive faster now!” Montecie congratulated sincerely.

Hiro and the White Bone Clan members were joyful, nodding excitedly.

Shi Yan stood still, his eyes closed while the energy on his body moved unceasingly. Suddenly, he opened his eyes, looking at Ming Hao, Xuan He, and Frederick. “Your chance’s coming...”

Ming Hao, Xuan He, and Frederick were thrilled; they knew what Shi Yan meant. They immediately prepared to receive the energy from him.

“That Power Upanishad Symbol Tower...” Mei Ji said skeptically.

At this moment, the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower was floating between Hui and the Dark Abyss. Zi Yao was sitting on the head of a massive snake, her face cold, her eyes radiant.

Tian Xie and the others hovered behind that snake, struggling with the Devouring Clan.

On the Devouring Clan’s side, Edgar, Labitte, and the others were surrounding the Dark Abyss. The two energies, one was the nine-colored outer space divine light and the other was a column of dark light, were coiling around the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower, pulling and tugging.

Hui and Devour vied for the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower, but they didn’t ignite the battle. They didn’t use their lives to fight, as it seemed that they were both afraid of something.

They didn’t mind Shi Yan’s team much. To them, the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower was the most important thing.

Mei Ji screamed as she wanted to ask if Shi Yan wanted to join that competition for the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower. Anyway, the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower had a connection with him and his co-soul.

As Shi Yan was about to answer her, he felt his soul shaking hard; he then turned to Audrey.

Audrey was shivering, sweat beading her forehead. It was like she was having a nightmare, and the darkness had shrouded her one more time. She was panicked beyond words.

He suddenly recognized a terrifying threat that had risen and expanded like the tide. He pondered, then talked to Hiro and Montecie. “We should get back to the Grace Mainland first. I am giving the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower up. I feel quite insecure right now!”

Hiro and Montecie turned to Audrey as if they could also feel that horrible terror. Montecie cried, “It...Has it awakened?”

“It has woken up.” Shi Yan forced a smile. “Audrey saw Brian being killed. It means it’s taking action. Because Audrey, Brian, and I have a soul connection, I know it has started to take action. Since Hui and Devour are in its territory, they don’t know yet.”

Everybody was terrified.

In one’s territory, there was no chance to defeat him. Shi Yan’s presumption had frightened everybody else. Without hesitation, they nodded as they knew that the situation would be unfavorable.

“We should return to the Grace Mainland first. Then, we have to move the Grace Mainland out of here!” Shi Yan resolutely said, and everybody nodded in agreement.

While Devour and Hui were still vying for the Power Upanishad Symbol Tower, Shi Yan, Hiro, Montecie, and the others had forcefully torn the space barriers to leave the Ancient Demon Continent.

They urged the power Upanishads, using the maximum speed to enter the Agate Star Area and Grace Mainland.

“Shi Yan, are you going to move the Grace Mainland out of Desolate Territory?” When Xia Xin Yan and Fu Wei got to know of Shi Yan’s intention, they were scared out of their wits. They thought that he was crazy.

“I don’t have time to explain carefully. The Grace Mainland must leave Desolate Territory as fast as possible. Otherwise, it will be the biggest calamity ever.” Shi Yan looked worried. He thought, then asked Ming Hao and DeCarlos, “You’ve mastered Space power Upanishad. I’m giving you four hours. You must bring all the warriors who have a good relationship with us to the Grace Mainland. We’re in a rush. I hope you can do that as fast as you can!”

“Shi Yan, can you tell us what’s going on? What will happen to Desolate Territory?” Blood Devil and Yang Tian Emperor changed their countenances.

Checking Audrey, Shi Yan tried to find the premonition in his soul. He took a deep breath and then said, “Desolate will destroy this world to gather energy. All creatures in this Desolate Territory have taken in the heaven and earth energy. So, the stronger they are, the more energy they have used. When Desolate was separated, it couldn’t do that. But now, it has woken up. All the warriors born in Desolate Territory are parts of its power. In the past, it wouldn’t do that. But now, it needs a lot of energy to fight Devour and Hui. It’s possible that it will annihilate this entire world to gather energy!”

Shi Yan only had a vague feeling, which wasn’t really clear. “Normal people wouldn’t be killed because they didn’t absorb the heaven and earth energy. Hence, Desolate won’t aim at them. It wants warriors...The stronger the warriors are, the harder it will be to escape!”

Yang Tian Emperor, Blood Devil, Xuan He, Ming Hao, and DeCarlos were chilled from fear.

“If I’m not wrong, it has started now. Today, it’s slaughtering the Ancient God Star Area.” Shi Yan took a deep breath and shouted, “We don’t have much time. You guys, scatter and take action. I know the Grace Mainland has many teleportation formations. Every warrior with Space power Upanishad should activate them all. Bring the ones who have a good relationship with us here! Hurry up!”

DeCarlos and Ming Hao exchanged looks, then turned into jets of light and disappeared. Ming Hao had prepared to receive energy from Shi Yan, but now, he didn’t care that much, immediately flying away.

“All of you, go!” Shi Yan urged.

Xia Xin Yan, Yang Tian Emperor, Blood Devil, and Holy Beast Azure Dragon of the Heavenly Monster Tribe, as well as Fu Wei of the Potion and Tool Pavilion, looked like they knew that the end of the world was near. They turned into jets of light, moving away to prepare.

Shi Yan tried to control, not letting his energy vanish as he talked to Hiro and Montecie, “Give us some time!”

“Alright!” Hiro and Montecie nodded, “You should know your limit. We can’t linger here. If Desolate has recovered fully, you’re not his match in this Desolate Territory. Hui and Devour are here too. If they can’t realize this situation earlier, they will face big troubles as well.”

“I know. After it killed all the creatures in the Ancient God Star Area, it will come for Audrey and me. We’re the key!” Shi Yan felt a flame burning his heart. “Watch the Grace Mainland for me. I have to leave and prepare. I owe somebody, and have to bring them with me.”

“Sure!” Hiro and Montecie understood how dangerous the situation was, so they didn’t ask and just agreed immediately.

Shi Yan’s body flashed, disappearing into the void of the Grace Mainland. In just a blink of an eye, he had moved thousands of miles.

Fortunately, the Agate Star Area had merged with many other star areas. With the Origin of the Grace Mainland, Shi Yan could create the connection with the other stars in this star area to teleport immediately.

He reappeared in the Fantasy Mist Star Area, landing on a life star. It was the Water Cloud Star under the Drifting Fire’s management. The Shang family was cultivating in a massive city. Shang Ying Yue was trying to comprehend her power inside a snow chamber.

Shi Yan appeared there all of a sudden.

“Who’s there?” Shang Ying Yue opened her eyes, carrying a murderous aura. However, she turned thrilled instantly, screaming ear-piercingly, “Shi Yan!”

“Come here, all of you!” Shi Yan’s Soul Consciousness covered every corner of the city. Shang Qiu, An Liya, Shang Chen, and Shussia had received his message. They immediately gathered in the secret chamber.

“Shi Yan, where have you been?”

“Kid, why are you here?”

“What happened?”

Shi Yan wore a heavy face, “I don’t have time to explain much. I’m here to take you away. I give you fifteen minutes to prep. Then, I will take you out of here. I repeat, you have fifteen minutes to bring your relatives here. All the experts in this star area will be killed shortly. If you want to live, you have to listen to me!”

He looked at Shang Ying Yue deep in her eyes and then disappeared.

Everybody of the Shang family was petrified. Shang Qiu and An Liya didn’t get a clue. They thought that Shi Yan was crazy.

Shang Chen was bewildered for a while and then yelled resolutely, “Why are you still idle? He gave us only fifteen minutes. You think you got plenty of time? Move, quick! Gather all the people you want to take with you!”

“Hey?” An Liya was perplexed.

“Shut up!” Shang Chen bellowed, “Move, quickly! He’s the master of the Bloodthirsty Force now. His life magnetic field is much more powerful than Ming Hao. Do you think he would come here just to prank you at his realm and new position?”

An Liya was frightened. Shussia, her mother, also knew that the doomsday was coming. She hurried as if she had her brows on fire. “Do as he said!”

Shi Yan’s next stop was the Fiery Rain Star Area.

Yu Shan was teaching Xuan Fei Fire power Upanishad inside a massive volcano with running lava. She had set up layers of barriers that normal people couldn’t break.

Boop! Boop! Boop!

Yu Shan knew her barriers were torn. As she was still baffled, she saw a shadow landing. It was Shi Yan!

“All creatures in this star area will be obliterated soon. If you want to live, leave with me. Now!” Shi Yan didn’t talk any nonsense. As soon as he arrived, he told them his purpose right away.

Yu Shan and Xuan Fei were dumbstruck, looking at him blankly. After a while, Yu Shan nodded solemnly, “We always work alone. We can leave at any minute.”

And just like that, they left the place with Shi Yan.

With Soul Control power Upanishad, Shi Yan could make thousands of soul clones visit the Gu God Sect in the Hollow Fearsome Star Area, the Wu family in the Prosaic Star Area, and the Xiao Family in the Sirius Star Area...

At the same time, DeCarlos, Ming Hao, Xuan He, and Frederick were gathering all the ones they could at their maximum speed.

The warriors in the Agate Star Area like Fu Wei, Blood Devil, Gu Te, and Bath also took action. The teleportation formations on the Grace Mainland were working at their max capacity, bringing many warriors to the land. The scattered experts everywhere, the ones who had good connections with Shi Yan, had been gathered.
